name: Lead & Inquiry Agent
description: Responds to every inbound inquiry — WhatsApp, web form, call — within seconds. Qualifies, answers FAQs, and books calls.
longDescription: This agent qualifying outbound and inbound inquiries in seconds rather than hours. It engages leads across WhatsApp, web forms, or phone, answer frequently asked questions based on your custom business data, schedules calls/visits directly onto your sales calendar, and hands off qualified leads.
features: Qualifies inbound inquiries instantly 24/7
Engages leads across WhatsApp, web forms, and voice lines
Answers business FAQs accurately without human delay
Schedules meetings directly to calendars (Calendly, HubSpot, etc.)

name: Customer Support & Doubt-Resolution Agent
description: 24/7 assistant trained on your knowledge base — answers customer questions accurately and escalates when needed.
longDescription: Deploy a human-grade support assistant trained entirely on your business documents, workflows, and FAQs. It handles repetitive product or doubt-solving queries instantly, retains conversational context, and seamlessly escalates complex requests to your human support team.
features: 24/7 instant replies with full context retention
Trained on your specific knowledge base & business data
Multi-lingual support for global customers
Automated human escalation protocols (Zendesk, Slack)

name: Document & Workflow Automation Agent
description: Checks, scores, and processes documents at scale — homework, applications, claims, and paperwork.
longDescription: An agent that checks, grades, and processes paperwork at scale. It scans handwriting or documents (homework, application forms, claims, receipts), matches them against logic rubrics, generates feedback, and updates your CRM or school portal.
features: High-accuracy OCR for document and handwriting scanning
Auto-checks and grades according to custom rubrics
Generates immediate structured feedback for applicants/students
Auto-syncs scores and data to backend systems

name: Content & Marketing Automation Agent
description: Turns raw content (lectures, calls, product descriptions) into ready-to-publish social material on autopilot.
longDescription: Scale your content output without scaling your marketing team. This agent processes raw recordings (lectures, podcast episodes, sales calls) and converts them into ready-to-publish shorts, reels, posts, and captions, keeping your channels active on autopilot.
features: Extracts engaging short clips from long-form video or audio
Generates context-rich captions and platform-specific hashtags
Learns and replicates your unique brand voice
Auto-schedules publications to social media boards

name: Outbound & Follow-Up Agent
description: Automated outreach for follow-ups, reminders, and re-engagement via voice or WhatsApp.
longDescription: An outbound engine built to re-engage past prospects, chase invoice reminders, and execute follow-ups. Designed to speak/write naturally, adhere strictly to guidelines, and log all interaction details back to your main database.
features: Automates Conversational outreach over WhatsApp or Twilio voice
Handles appointment reminders and invoice follow-ups
Ensures strict script compliance and logging
Updates CRM status based on call results

name: Custom Dedicated Agent
description: Scope, build, and deploy a dedicated agent for your custom, repetitive, rule-based-but-judgment-requiring tasks.
longDescription: If it is repetitive, rules-based, but requires some judgment, we will scope it, construct it in a sandbox, and deploy it to your systems. Includes founder-led delivery and a free pilot period before you pay.
features: Discovery audit of your manual workflows
Tailor-made model logic and API integrations
Pilot trial on actual production workflows before payment
Dedicated monitoring and ongoing performance tuning
